benchmark_pack.title: Visual Deictic Fixture Pack
benchmark_pack.purpose: Metadata-safe scaffold pack for testing placeholder bindings between deictic transcript language and chart-frame context.
benchmark_pack.known_difficulty: Deictic phrases require visual context and can hallucinate chart objects when frame binding is weak.
known_failure_modes: misaligns transcript phrase and chart frame
treats placeholder binding as real multimodal evidence
notes: Contains placeholder frame and segment identifiers only.
Does not include images, screenshots, captions, or video frames.
